changes.summary: Bundle JS from webui_js parts (fallback to webui.js) and rebuild webui.html as a single Ingress-safe artifact.
Regenerated bundled Web UI HTML (inline CSS/JS) from sources.
Converted to thin wrapper/comment pointing contributors to modular sources; retains version marker.
Kept as the HTML source template used by the bundler.
Core state, helpers, constants, DOM cache, and utilities.
Rendering functions and search/find-next behaviour (lineHeight based scrolling).
Job detail meta rendering and action button state/visibility (includes cancel/delete caching).
Refresh/polling loop, pause semantics, tail fetching and offsets, overview updates.
Event bindings, DOMContentLoaded-safe init, and double-load guard.

notes: Refactor Web UI sources: split monolithic webui.js into modular files under pythonista_job_runner/app/webui_js/ while keeping webui.html bundled for Ingress-safe deployment.
Fix Web UI bugs and harden behaviour (pause semantics, cancel/delete button caching, DOM-ready init guard, double-load guard, accurate search scrolling, broader WebView compatibility).
